productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Solid Langston Brown T-Shirts
description: CompositionBrown round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline, short sleeves, distressed look chest print and stitch detailing from the neckline to the sleeve hem, along the sleeve hem and hemlineFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Wear the brand pride on your locomotive t-shirt.
